items.title: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
items.description: The petition argues the violence against migrants in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity.

items.title: Norway to make formal complaint to FIFA over Balogun red card saga
items.description: FIFA overturned the suspension for a red card for the USA forward at the World Cup after a request from President Trump.
